messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0164",
  "title": "应用",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 应用

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading "应用" (Applications) and contains no substantive text. It can only indicate a general topic of "applications," but it lacks the content necessary to answer specific retrieval questions regarding entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. No factual details, examples, or contextual data are provided.
